DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Responses To Special Interrogatories,
Set One, Request For Monetary Sanctions.
Granted. Plaintiff must serve discovery responses no later than 2/28/11 and the requests for admissions are deemed admitted, unless Plaintiff have served responses prior to the hearing.
Plaintiff's counsel must pay sanctions to Defendant in the total amount of $700.00 by
3/4/11. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not Reported (301/PJB)
